executives.background: Vice Chairman since 2023. Previously Executive Vice President, Strategy, Policy & Development.

executives.background: Former Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Retired in 2024.

executives.name: Jim Umpleby
executives.background: Jim Umpleby is chairman of the board of directors and chief executive officer of Caterpillar Inc. He joined Solar Turbines, a Caterpillar subsidiary, in 1980 and has held numerous leadership roles within the company. He was appointed CEO in 2017 and Chairman in 2018.

executives.background: Vice Chairman of Oaktree Capital Group, LLC. Director since 2017.

executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of Lockheed Martin Corporation. Director since 2021.

executives.background: Retired Vice President and CFO of Chevron Corporation.

executives.name: Peter Robertson
executives.background: Mr. Robertson has served as a Director since 2009. He is the former Vice Chairman of the Board of Chevron Corporation.

executives.name: Ronald Sugar
executives.background: Dr. Sugar is the former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation, where he served from 2003 to 2010.

executives.name: Wanda Austin
executives.background: Dr. Austin is the former President and CEO of The Aerospace Corporation, a leading architect for the nation’s national security space programs. She served in this role from 2008 to 2016.
